@import 'tailwindcss'; @import 'tw-animate-css'; @import 'tippy.js/dist/tippy.css'; @import 'tippy.js/animations/shift-away.css'; [x-cloak] { display: none !important; } .tippy-box[data-theme~='laravel'] { @apply max-w-7xl! rounded-md border text-xs shadow-md backdrop-blur-md overflow-x-auto; @apply border-neutral-800 bg-neutral-900 text-white; @apply dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-100; } .tippy-content[data-theme~='laravel'] { @apply px-2 py-1; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .shiki, .shiki span { color: var(--shiki-dark) !important; font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style) !important; font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight) !important; text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration) !important; } }
